lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: Yes please! How many do you have?

lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: Hello! I've had a few to drink!

lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: I haven't had that many, have I?

lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: 'Oh there once was a dwarf named Tonalo! He started a fight with a buffalo!'

lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: 'He kicked and he punched, it was quite the show! But he tripped on a rock and stubbed his toe!'

lines.speaker: Kalko
lines.text: What? I didn't even do it!
